title: Singing Voice Synthesis Using Machine Learning
subtitle: Text-to-singing audio pipeline
description: Built an end-to-end ML pipeline that turns lyrics into sung audio using FastSpeech2 Conformer, HiFi-GAN, transfer learning, CSD dataset analysis, and a Gradio interface.

title: Distributed HIP DNN Pipeline
subtitle: MPI4Py to AMD HIP kernels
description: Designed a distributed training architecture where MPI producers stream sharded batches into HIP consumers for GPU kernel execution, benchmarking throughput, latency, and scale.

title: MedCare
subtitle: Disease prediction with Django
description: Developed disease prediction machine learning models and integrated them with a Django web interface for accessible healthcare decision support.

title: Hybrid Bucket-Radix Sorting Study
subtitle: GPU vs CPU algorithm comparison
description: Compared non-comparison sorting strategies across GPU and CPU architectures, including a hybrid bucket-radix approach focused on performance, memory behavior, and scalability.

title: Co-Purchasing Analysis and Recommendation
subtitle: Data mining for product discovery
description: Analyzed co-purchase patterns to surface product relationships and recommendation opportunities using database design, association thinking, and insight-focused reporting.

title: Uber Clone Ride-Hailing App
subtitle: Mobile-first booking workflow
description: Developed a blockchain-based ride-hailing system using smart contracts, Ethereum Rinkeby Testnet crypto payments, real-time GPS tracking, and automated fare calculations.

title: Skin Disease Identification
subtitle: AI-assisted healthcare screening
description: Built an AI model with 75% accuracy using TensorFlow, Keras, and OpenVINO, then deployed a mobile-friendly UI for easy diagnosis access.
